name: RiskReward.io
description_short: Free online risk/reward calculator and position sizing tool for traders, with visual trade planning and R-multiple tracking across all markets.
description_long:
RiskReward.io is a focused risk management tool designed to help traders calculate optimal position sizes, visualize risk/reward ratios, and plan trades with proper risk management before entering positions. The platform addresses one of the most critical aspects of trading that many traders neglect: sizing positions correctly relative to account size and risk tolerance.

The core calculator allows traders to input their account size, risk percentage per trade, entry price, stop loss, and target price to instantly calculate the optimal position size, dollar risk, potential reward, and R-multiple (risk/reward ratio). The visual trade planner shows entries, stops, and targets on a price scale, making it easy to see the risk/reward profile at a glance.

RiskReward.io supports stocks, forex (with pip calculations), futures (with contract specifications), and crypto. Traders can save trade plans, track their R-multiples over time, and analyze their risk management consistency. The tool integrates well as a companion to any charting platform or broker, filling the gap that most platforms leave in pre-trade risk analysis. The basic calculator is free, with a premium tier adding portfolio-level risk analysis and trade history tracking.
pros: Simple and focused — does one thing well
Free tier covers basic risk calculations
Supports multiple asset classes with correct calculations
cons: Very niche — only covers risk/position sizing
No broker integration for direct execution
Premium features are basic compared to full journals
meta_description: Free online risk/reward calculator and position sizing tool for traders, with visual trade planning and R-multiple tracking across all markets.
